mano_cua.result_summary: Menu组件scroll jump bug确认：在Menu页面顶部打开Products菜单后关闭，向下滚动到Default示例区域，点击该区域的Products按钮时页面意外滚回顶部Preview区域。点击Menu trigger导致页面滚动位置跳变，用户阅读位置被打断。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: BUG CONFIRMED: Clicking the Products menu button in the Default example section caused the page to scroll up unexpectedly. The viewport jumped from showing 'Examples > Default' section back to showing the first Preview section near the top of the page. The Menu component has a scroll jump bug - clicking a Menu trigger button causes the page to unexpectedly scroll to a different position.
